report.summary: Standup v5 Apr 3: 5 agents ran last hour (build+design+community+eod+standup) = $437 human-equiv. 2 new learn guides (Berachain PoL + Crypto DCA) built, 5 OG images, 5 tweets (#415-419), newsletter v36. BTC ~$66,228 (dropping from $68.7K recovery). F&G 8-9 Extreme Fear. March BLS payrolls releasing 8:30a ET TODAY. Wormhole 1.28B unlock at 11:30 UTC. 40 uncommitted files — deploy debt 14th consecutive escalation. 311 learn dirs + 115 tool dirs on disk. Today: 15 agent runs, $1,175 human-equiv.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v4 → v5): 5 agents ran — build-v2 (2 new learn guides: Berachain PoL + Crypto DCA), design (UX fixes + 5 OG images), community-v3 (5 tweets #415-419 + newsletter v36 + 2 social cards), eod-v2 (QA + data engineering audit), standup-v4. Uncommitted files grew from 39 → 40. 2 social card SVGs added (Berachain PoL + Crypto DCA).

MARKET UPDATE — BTC SLIDING AHEAD OF JOBS: BTC dropped to ~$66,228 (from $68,743 last standup — a -3.7% reversal). The Good Friday recovery is fading. March BLS nonfarm payrolls releasing 8:30a ET today — February was -92K (worst in 4 months). ADP March was +62K (above consensus). If jobs miss again → F&G could hit 5-6 (all-time low territory). NYSE/Nasdaq/bonds still closed for Good Friday — crypto sole price discovery market.
BTC: ~$66,228 (-3.7% from last standup $68,743). ETH: ~$2,082 (range-bound). F&G: 8-9/100 (Extreme Fear — <20 days total in history below 10). BTC dominance: 58.16%. Total crypto mcap: ~$2.36T.

ETF FLOWS (Latest Apr 1): -$173.7M net outflow (IBIT -$86.5M, FBTC -$78.6M, GBTC -$13.3M). Q1 total: ~$500M net outflows, but March alone was +$1.32B inflows. Mixed institutional signals. Stablecoins: $316B ATH — record dry powder.

TOKEN EVENTS TODAY: Wormhole (W) 1.28B token unlock at 11:30 UTC — 28.4% of total supply cliff unlock to core contributors. W at ~$0.01. Historical pattern: 60-80% of cliff unlocks see selling pressure within 48h, recovery 2-6 weeks. HYPE $376M unlock Apr 6 approaching (9.92M tokens to core contributors).

CONTENT ON DISK: 311 learn page dirs + 115 tool dirs = 426 total. 74 learn guides with page.tsx. 334 OG SVGs (up 5 this cycle). 1023 lines in published-pages.ts. 40 uncommitted files (5 modified + 35 untracked). Last deploy: e3f63fc.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible — metrics from local file analysis + agent reports + web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v4 → v5): Build-v2 produced 2 new learn guides: Berachain & Proof of Liquidity (463 lines, intermediate, tri-token model, $3.2B TVL, validator economics) + Crypto DCA Strategy (518 lines, beginner, backtested 202%/6,712% returns, fear-based contrarian strategies). Design ran UX audit — fixed responsive typography + scroll anchoring on both new guides + created 5 OG images (DCA, Berachain, EIP-4844, Options, DeFi Lending). Community-v3 drafted 5 tweets (#415-419) for Oct 26-Nov 1, newsletter v36 'The Consistency Cheat Code', 2 social cards. EOD-v2 ran QA — flagged 2 untracked pages missing structured data (Drift + Polkadot), confirmed 0/6 API rate limiting, 1/6 fallback data.
TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 15 agent runs across 6 types — standup×5 ($225), build×2 ($466), design×4 ($240), community×3 ($123), eod×2 ($126). Total human-equiv: $1,175.

NEW CONTENT THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides (Berachain PoL 463 lines + DCA 518 lines = 981 lines). 5 OG images. 2 social card SVGs. 5 tweets (#415-419). Newsletter v36. UX fixes on 2 pages. Data engineering audit on 6 API routes.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (14TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): 40 uncommitted files in cryptodegen repo (5 modified + 35 untracked). Every hour of delay = lost SEO indexing. BTC dropping + F&G at 8 = peak search volume for fear/DCA/F&G tools. Our Fear & Greed tool, DCA Calculator, and 74 learn guides are invisible to Google. Wormhole unlock at 11:30 UTC will spike 'token unlock' searches. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED — single git add + commit + push unblocks weeks of work.
P1 — STRUCTURED DATA GAP: 2 untracked learn pages (Drift Protocol $285M Hack, Polkadot Staking Halving) have Metadata exports but NO JSON-LD structured data. Need SEO pass before publish queue entry.
P2 — API RESILIENCE: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 1/6 with fallback data (market-dominance only). Prices/fear-greed/trending at risk if upstream APIs fail.
P3 — 141 TS ERRORS: 4 files, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Unchanged across 14 cycles.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 CRITICAL — 14TH ESCALATION): 40 files blocking all SEO value. BTC dropping to $66.2K with F&G at 8 = PEAK DEMAND for our exact content (fear gauge, DCA calculator, staking guides). March BLS jobs report at 8:30a ET could tank markets further → even more fear-driven searches. Wormhole 1.28B unlock at 11:30 UTC. Every minute without deploy = lost organic traffic during the highest-signal search window of the year. This is a $0-cost action. JEFE MUST ACT.

PRIORITY 2 — STRUCTURED DATA + PUBLISH BATCH: After deploy, add JSON-LD to Drift Protocol and Polkadot Staking pages, then queue + publish: Berachain PoL, Crypto DCA, Drift Hack, Polkadot Staking (4 new pages). These cover trending narratives: PoL innovation, DCA during extreme fear, major hack post-mortem, staking economics shift.

PRIORITY 3 — API HARDENING: Add FALLBACK_DATA to prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields (5/6 routes missing). Add checkRateLimit() to all 6 public routes. Current state = one CoinGecko outage away from broken user experience. With F&G at 8 and potential traffic spike from jobs report, API reliability is revenue-critical.
